mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_member (class_id, user_id, joined_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{classId}, #{userId}, NOW(), #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: SELECT id, class_id as classId, user_id as userId, joined_at as joinedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class_member WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, class_id as classId, user_id as userId, joined_at as joinedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class_member WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, class_id as classId, user_id as userId, joined_at as joinedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class_member WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, class_id as classId, user_id as userId, joined_at as joinedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
